summary: The user is organizing their online shopping expenses and has been tracking them using a spreadsheet. They have made at least 10 online purchases since April, including sneakers from Amazon, a laptop from Best Buy, and books from Barnes & Noble.
facts: The user purchased a pair of sneakers from Amazon on April 10, 2023, for $80.
The user bought a laptop from Best Buy's website on June 12, 2023, for $1,200.
The user purchased books from Barnes & Noble's online store on June 5, 2023, for $50.
The user has made at least 10 online purchases since April 2023.
The user is currently using a simple spreadsheet to track their online shopping expenses.
